name: Neewer MS150C Mini RGB LED Monolight
description: The MS150C Mini RGB LED Monolight from Neewer is a compact and portable RGB LED monolight suitable for use for both still and video imaging. It features CCT-based 2700K-6500K bi-color lighting with a 150W output. It also has an HSI mode for hue, saturation, and intensity control to provide a selection of any of the 360 colors of the color wheel.

features.Key Features: For Video Production and Vlogging | Output: 16,600 Lux at 3.3' | 2700-6500K CCT; Full RGB Color Control | AC or Battery Power | Onboard, Bluetooth App, 2.4G Control | CRI 97 | TLCI 98 | Passive/Active Adjustable Fan Cooling | 17 Customizable Light Effects | Bowens S-Mount Adapter | Handgrip Stand Adapter, Carrying Case
features.What’s In The Box: 1x MS150C LED Video Light | 1x Standard Reflector | 1x Handle | 1x Power Cable (US Plug) | 1x Power Adapter | 1x Bowens Mount Adapter Ring | 1x Carry Bag
